title: Electronic warfare in the Persian Gulf: How GPS interference is disrupting the Middle East
summary_full: Since the start of the U.S.-Israel war with Iran on Feb. 28, interference with location-based services has disrupted life across the Persian Gulf.
summary_public: Since the start of the U.S.-Israel war with Iran on Feb. 28, interference with location-based services has disrupted life across the Persian Gulf.

IR.label: negative
